{{CargoRelicResonance
|relics=Terracotta Warrior,Caesar Statue,Impression Sunrise,Portrait of Peter I,Along the River
|rank=orange
|amount=5
|category=self
|description=Per 10k Relic Points, Snail ATK +5; Relic Points: 600,000/600,000
}}
[[Category:Self]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Relic Points]]
